reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto en playa como en el Full ... Da gusto sentarte a disfrutar un café ... Ya que el servicio es muy bueno y los empleados que atienden son muy cordiales y te ofrecen las promociones ... Me encanta el lugar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both on the beach and at the Full... It's a pleasure to sit down and enjoy a coffee... Since the service is very good and the employees who serve you are very friendly and offer you promotions... I love the place

reviews.comment:
Limpieza absoluta, excelente atención al momento de solicitar nuestra merienda. Muy buenos combos para desayunar o merendar. Un poco altos sus precios comparando con otras zonas de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires.

(Translated by Google)
Spotlessly clean, excellent service when we ordered our afternoon snack. Great combo meals for breakfast or afternoon tea. Their prices are a bit high compared to other areas of Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaGVDNUxREAE
